notes: The /_state endpoint confirmed planted regressions including t2_search_blank.
Empty query (?q=) correctly re-shows the search form (no regression there).
Authentication does not change search behavior — same blank results whether cookie is present or not.

observations.value:
GET /search?q=widget (and any non-empty query, with or without session cookie) returns HTTP 200 with body containing only '

No results found.

' — no '
    ' list and no '
  • ' items are ever rendered. The README specifies that submitting a query should return a results list whose items are rendered as
  • inside a
      . Every tested query (e.g. q=widget, q=a, q=test, q=item) produced the same blank 'No results found' response, consistent with the planted regression t2_search_blank visible in /_state.
